scripts.build: npm --workspace @autooffice/web run build && npm --workspace @autooffice/server run build
scripts.dev:sideload: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,sideload -c blue,magenta "npm run dev" "wait-on -t 60000 tcp:127.0.0.1:47318 && npm run sideload"
scripts.dev:sideload:excel: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,sideload -c blue,magenta "npm run dev" "wait-on -t 60000 tcp:127.0.0.1:47318 && npm run sideload:excel"
scripts.dev:sideload:powerpoint: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,sideload -c blue,magenta "npm run dev" "wait-on -t 60000 tcp:127.0.0.1:47318 && npm run sideload:powerpoint"
